_comment: MathML-specific WPT classification. Tests in `presentation-markup/**`, `crashtests/**`, and `relations/text-and-math/**` cover the rendering surface (`mathml-to-pdf` reachable through the `html-to-pdf` inline-MathML adapter). The relations/html5-tree and relations/css-styling subtrees are testharness.js-based attribute/integration tests and don't render anything by themselves.

out-of-scope.reason: Helper assets (feature-detection, fragment library) — not tests themselves
Build / fixture-generation utilities — not test fixtures
MathMLElement IDL / DOM attribute integration tests — testharness.js, no JS runtime
CSS-to-MathML attribute mapping verification — testharness.js, no JS runtime

pending-substrate.reason: Stretchy operator size match — depends on STIX Math font being bundled (default Times has no MATH table)

Uses fraction-rulethickness10000.woff, a WPT synthetic test font with a deliberately broken cmap that browsers handle via per-codepoint font fallback. phpdftk's MathmlRenderer is single-font-per-call; cmap-miss fallback requires plumbing the cascade chain. Tracked in #109. Real production math fonts (LatinModernMath, STIX, Cambria) ship complete cmaps and don't hit this path.
Uses lineheight5000-typolineheight2300.woff, the WPT broken-cmap test font pattern. Same substrate gap as frac-bar-* (cmap-miss fallback). Tracked in #109.

Uses CSS `style="background: red/green"` on mspace as layout markers. mathbackground style fallback would project the colour into our painter, but estimateHeightEm heuristics drift on non-mpadded shapes and the fallback regresses unrelated tests. Tracked in #103. Fix requires real layout for the rect bounds.
Same CSS `style="background"` pattern as space-2 with the additional `vertical-align` attribute on mspace. Tracked in #103.
